\"categoryorder\":\"array\",\"categoryarray\":[\"Phone\",\"Headphones\",\"Laptop\",\"Tablet\",\"Monitor\"]},\"yaxis\":{\"anchor\":\"x\",\"domain\":[0.0,1.0],\"title\":{\"text\":\"Total_Sales\"}},\"legend\":{\"title\":{\"text\":\"Product\"},\"tracegroupgap\":0},\"title\":{\"text\":\"Interactive Total Sales by Product\"},\"barmode\":\"relative\"},                        {\"responsive\": true}                    ).then(function(){\n",
              "                            \n",
              "var gd = document.getElementById('626af966-f340-471e-9d99-bea9d6b125f6');\n",
              "var x = new MutationObserver(function (mutations, observer) {{\n",
              "        var display = window.getComputedStyle(gd).display;\n",
              "        if (!display || display === 'none') {{\n",
              "            console.log([gd, 'removed!']);\n",
              "            Plotly.purge(gd);\n",
              "            observer.disconnect();\n",
              "        }}\n",
              "}});\n",
              "\n",
              "// Listen for the removal of the full notebook cells\n",
              "var notebookContainer = gd.closest('#notebook-container');\n",
              "if (notebookContainer) {{\n",
              "    x.observe(notebookContainer, {childList: true});\n",
              "}}\n",
              "\n",
              "// Listen for the clearing of the current output cell\n",
              "var outputEl = gd.closest('.output');\n",
              "if (outputEl) {{\n",
              "    x.observe(outputEl, {childList: true});\n",
              "}}\n",
              "\n",
              "                        })                };                            </script>        </div>\n",
              "</body>\n",
              "</html>"
            ]

          "metadata": {}
        }
      ],
      "source": [
        "# ==============================\n",
        "# INTERACTIVE SALES DASHBOARD (ONE CELL COMPLETE)\n",
        "# ==============================\n",
        "\n",
        "# Install libraries\n",
        "!pip install seaborn plotly --quiet\n",
        "\n",
        "# Import libraries\n",
        "import pandas as pd\n",
        "import seaborn as sns\n",
        "import matplotlib.pyplot as plt\n",
        "import plotly.express as px\n",
        "\n",
        "# Load dataset (make sure file is uploaded in Colab)\n",
        "df = pd.read_csv('/content/sales_data (4).csv')\n",
        "\n",
        "# ==============================\n",
        "# DATA PREPROCESSING\n",
        "# ==============================\n",
        "df.dropna(inplace=True)\n",
        "\n",
        "# Convert Date column if exists\n",
        "if 'Date' in df.columns:\n",
        "    df['Date'] = pd.to_datetime(df['Date'])\n",
        "\n",
        "    print(\"Dataset Preview:\")\n",
        "    display(df.head())\n",
        "\n",
        "    # ==============================\n",
        "    # 1. BOX PLOT (Seaborn)\n",
        "    # ==============================\n",
        "    plt.figure()\n",
        "    sns.boxplot(x='Product', y='Total_Sales', data=df)\n",
        "    plt.title('Total Sales Distribution by Product')\n",
        "    plt.show()\n",
        "\n",
        "    # ==============================\n",
        "    # 2. VIOLIN PLOT\n",
        "    # ==============================\n",
        "    plt.figure()\n",
        "    sns.violinplot(x='Product', y='Total_Sales', data=df)\n",
        "    plt.title('Violin Plot of Total Sales Distribution')\n",
        "    plt.show()\n",
        "\n",
        "    # ==============================\n",
        "    # 3. HEATMAP (Correlation)\n",
        "    # ==============================\n",
        "    plt.figure()\n",
        "    sns.heatmap(df.corr(numeric_only=True), annot=True)\n",
        "    plt.title(\"Correlation Heatmap\")\n",
        "    plt.show()\n",
        "\n",
        "    # ==============================\n",
        "    # 4. SALES TREND (Line Chart)\n",
        "    # ==============================\n",
        "    if 'Date' in df.columns:\n",
        "        df_sorted = df.sort_values('Date')\n",
        "        plt.figure()\n",
        "        plt.plot(df_sorted['Date'], df_sorted['Total_Sales'])\n",
        "        plt.title(\"Total Sales Trend Over Time\")\n",
        "        plt.xticks(rotation=45)\n",
        "        plt.show()\n",
        "\n",
        "        # ==============================\n",
        "        # 5. INTERACTIVE BAR CHART (Plotly)\n",
        "        # ==============================\n",
        "        fig1 = px.bar(df, x='Product', y='Total_Sales', color='Product',\n",
        "                      title=\"Interactive Total Sales by Product\")\n",
        "        fig1.show()\n",
        "\n",
        "        # ==============================\n",
        "        # 6. INTERACTIVE SCATTER DASHBOARD\n",
        "        # ==============================\n",
        "        if 'Profit' in df.columns:\n",
        "            fig2 = px.scatter(df, x=\"Total_Sales\", y=\"Profit\", color=\"Product\",\n",
        "                                  title=\"Total Sales vs Profit Dashboard\",\n",
        "                                        hover_data=df.columns)\n",
        "            fig2.show()\n",
        "\n",
        "            # ==============================\n",
        "            # BASIC INSIGHTS (IMPORTANT FOR MARKS)\n",
        "            # ==============================\n",
        "            print(\"\\n🔍 Key Insights:\")\n",
        "\n",
        "            # Highest sales category\n",
        "            top_product = df.groupby('Product')['Total_Sales'].sum().idxmax()\n",
        "            print(f\"• Highest sales product: {top_product}\")\n",
        "\n",
        "            # Average sales\n",
        "            print(f\"• Average Total Sales: {df['Total_Sales'].mean():.2f}\")\n",
        "\n",
        "            # Correlation insight\n",
        "            if 'Profit' in df.columns:\n",
        "                corr = df['Total_Sales'].corr(df['Profit'])\n",
        "                print(f\"• Correlation between Total Sales and Profit: {corr:.2f}\")\n",
        "\n",
        "            print(\"\\n✅ Dashboard Generated Successfully!\")"
      ]
    }
  ]
}
